trending_videos.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Final Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Watch the new trailer for The Devil Wears Prada 2 with original song “Runway” performed by Lady Gaga and Doechii. Get tickets now and experience the film only in theaters May 1: https://Fandango.com/TheDevilWearsPrada2

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel—Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as “Lily” and “Irv” from the first film. 
 
“The Devil Wears Prada 2” is produced by Wendy Finer

trending_videos.title: Air Supply — Making Love Out of Nothing at All (Sub. Español)
trending_videos.description:
🎙️ Artista | Air Supply
💿 Canción | Making Love Out of Nothing at All
📅 Fecha de Lanzamiento | 01/07/1983
📻 Géneros Musicales | Pop

✨ Acerca de la Canción:
“Making Love Out of Nothing at All” de Air Supply es una de las baladas más poderosas del soft rock de los 80, escrita por Jim Steinman. La canción juega con un contraste brillante: el narrador afirma saber hacer casi todo en la vida… excepto una cosa imposible de dominar — dejar a la persona que ama. Es una declaración emocional intensa donde el amor no nace de condiciones, sino “de la nada”, desde la pura conexión y entrega.

📲 Sígue a "Air Supply" en:
▶️ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLIx3q_0KLVHAxgxsvh_vSQ

🪩 [ Letra / Lyrics ] 🪩

[Verse 1]
I know just how to whisper
And I know just how to cry
I know just where to find the answers
And I know just how to lie
I know just how to fake it
And I know just how to scheme
I know just when to face the truth
And then I know just when to dream
And I know just where to touch you

trending_videos.title: Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
trending_videos.description:
Welcome to Bhooth Bangla. Yahan na toh log normal hain... Aur upar se Bangla bhi paranormal hai. 
Enter at your own risk 🧟‍♀️

#BhoothBanglaTrailer out now

#BhoothBangla, paid previews begin in theatres 16th April 2026, 9 PM onwards 👻

When London-returned Arjun Acharya arrives in the sleepy town of Mangalpur to host his sister’s wedding at his newly inherited ancestral palace, he finds himself caught in a whirlwind of terrified locals, bizarre ghostly happenings, and hilarious chaos—until he begins uncovering the shocking truth behind the palace’s centuries-old legend.

Balaji Telefilms Ltd. in association with Cape Of Good Films present
Bhooth Bangla

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Jisshu Sengupta, Manoj Joshi, Mithila Palkar, Asrani Ji, Rajesh Sharma 
Directed by: Priyadarshan
Produced by: Akshay Kumar, Shobha Kapoor, Ektaa R. Kapoor

movie_and_tv_trailers.description: Trailers for upcoming films and TV shows are a significant portion of trending videos.
examples: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Final Trailer
Marvel Television’s Daredevil: Born Again Season 2 | Official Trailer
Lord of the Flies | Official Trailer | Netflix
Bhooth Bangla -Official Trailer| Akshay Kumar, Tabu, Paresh, Wamiqa, Priyadarshan |In Cinemas 16 Apr
movie_and_tv_trailers.insights: Trailers consistently capture audience interest due to anticipation of new releases. Studios can leverage this by releasing trailers with exclusive sneak peeks or behind-the-scenes content.

news_and_reports.description: News segments, especially on global events and politics, are also trending.
examples: CNN Global Report: War With Iran
news_and_reports.insights: Timely and in-depth reporting on current affairs is crucial. Channels focusing on news can increase engagement by providing live updates and expert analyses.

sports_coverage.description: Sports events and related content maintain a strong presence.
sports_coverage.insights: Live sports coverage and pre/post-event analysis are popular. Channels can enhance viewership by incorporating interactive components like fan polls or expert predictions.

music_and_entertainment.description: Music videos and entertainment-related content continue to appeal to audiences.
examples: Air Supply — Making Love Out of Nothing at All (Sub. Español)
music_and_entertainment.insights: Classic music and multilingual content can tap into niche audiences and diverse demographics. Consider collaborations or remastered releases to rejuvenate interest.

superhero_and_fantasy_genres.description: Content related to superheroes and fantasy worlds are trending.
examples: Avengers Doomsday Doctor Doom Teaser Breakdown
superhero_and_fantasy_genres.insights: The superhero genre remains highly popular. Creators can engage audiences by exploring character backstories, fan theories, and cross-universe connections.

major_studio_involvement.description: Studios like 20th Century Studios and Marvel Entertainment are key players in trending content.
major_studio_involvement.insights: These studios effectively use high-quality production and existing fan bases to drive views. New creators can learn from their marketing strategies and production values.

news_outlets.description: Channels like FOX News and CNN are influential in trending news content.
news_outlets.insights: Credibility and real-time reporting are essential. Smaller news outlets can focus on niche topics or local news to differentiate themselves.

sports_broadcasters.description: ESPN's presence highlights the popularity of sports content.
sports_broadcasters.insights: Incorporating interactive elements such as live commentary and audience polls can increase engagement.

diverse_content_creators.description: Lesser-known channels like RetroVerse also trend with unique content offerings.
diverse_content_creators.insights: Niche content and targeting specific audience interests can lead to success even for smaller channels.

localization.description: Localized content, such as subtitled music videos, has a broad appeal.
localization.recommendations: Invest in creating multilingual content or subtitles to reach wider audiences.

cross-genre collaborations.description: Combining elements from different genres can create unique offerings.
cross-genre collaborations.recommendations: Explore collaborations between music, film, and sports for innovative content.

real-time interaction.description: Live interactions during broadcasts drive engagement.
real-time interaction.recommendations: Implement live Q&A sessions, polls, and real-time feedback during live events.

niche content exploration.description: Catering to specific interests can capture dedicated audience segments.
niche content exploration.recommendations: Identify underserved niches and tailor content to meet these specific interests.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
